title: vatica sumatrana
intro: Vatica sumatrana, also known as the Sumatran ironwood, is a species of tree native to the island of Sumatra in Indonesia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Vatica sumatrana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant often include extracts or infusions, which can be consumed as teas or used in topical applications.
